acceptance_criteria.description: TypeScript compiles with no errors after adding cross-level validators
All five cross-level invariants CL-T01 through CL-T05 are implemented as deterministic pure functions
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify that impl-task.ts implements CL-T01 (bidirectional parent-task consistency), CL-T02 (decomposed status requires at least one task), CL-T03 (module containment: child modules subset of parent, full coverage), CL-T04 (context_refs union covers impl spec_sections), CL-T05 (dependency ordering consistency between impl deps and task blocked_by/blocks). Each must be deterministic with no LLM involvement. The module must export a single entry point or individual check functions, all pure (no file I/O). Verdict: PASS if all five invariants are present, deterministic, and pure; FAIL if any are missing, non-deterministic, or perform I/O.
